title: [FIRRTL] design with layers not optimized as well as without

features.name: layerblock with trivially false assertion predicate
features.description: Code should include a layerblock containing an intrinsic assertion where the predicate can reduce to a trivially false condition
features.snippet:
layerblock A :
  intrinsic(circt_chisel_ifelsefatal<format="bar">, clock, eq(a, b), UInt<1>(1))

features.name: signal used both inside layerblock and outside
features.description: Code should include a node signal that is referenced both within a layerblock and outside the layerblock in the parent module
features.snippet:
node b = bits(a, 1, 0)
layerblock A :
  intrinsic(circt_chisel_ifelsefatal<format="bar">, clock, eq(a, b), UInt<1>(1))
connect c, b

features.name: bind statement for layer instantiation
features.description: Code should include a bind statement that instantiates a layer module and connects signals across module boundaries

features.name: synthesis guard with fatal assertion
features.description: Code should include an always block inside a synthesis guard that checks a condition and calls $fatal
